subject: London 24-25th Sep?
body:
Jeffrey!
I will be in London 24-25th Sep so please let me know if you'll be in the
neighborhood! Would be really fun to see you!

This is my entire itinerary:


23 september Milan

24 september Milan-Amsterdam - London

25 september London - Geneva

26 september Geneva - Zurich - Monaco

Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
